text.title: Claude JSON Extraction with Retry Loop
text.summary: Claude lacks native Structured Outputs; use prompt + markdown-fence stripping + json.loads + retry with a corrective message on parse failure.

section.title: Claude extraction pattern

rule.statement: Always strip markdown code fences before parsing Claude JSON output — Claude sometimes wraps JSON in triple-backtick blocks even when told not to.
rule.rationale: A prompt saying "return only JSON" reduces but does not eliminate markdown fences; the strip must always be present or json.loads raises a JSONDecodeError.

section.reference: Claude structured extraction with retry loop

section.title: Function-forcing on Claude
section.p: Alternatively, use the tool-forcing pattern from claude-tool-use to get typed JSON from Claude without the retry loop overhead.
